title: Minescript Addition
description: Small Addition for Minescript with useful extras
body:
# **Minescript Addition**

Adds some extras to Minescript



> placeBlock
- place a block without looking at the position
  
> placeOffhandBlock
- place a block without looking at the position
  
> mineBlock
- mine a block without looking at the position

> getScoreboards
- return all existing scoreboards
> getScoreboard
- returns the specified scoreboard
- sidebar
- belowname
- list (tab)

> getBossbars
- returns the Bossbars
  
[extension.py](https://github.com/Silberstern012/Minescript-Addition/blob/main/extension.py)

If you have an idea of what could be added, you can suggest it on the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/WD8AtSVf8)

Everything is explained on the [WIKI](https://github.com/Silberstern012/Minescript-Addition/wiki)
